services/cars-service/src/main/java/za/c.general_idea: Replace constructor-injected list with a static list from a Constant utility class.
Remove the constructor that previously accepted the list of cars, as the data source is now static.

services/reservations-service/src/main/j.general_idea: Remove the constructor and field that previously held the reservation list, as the data source is changing.
Replace references to the injected instance field with a static list from a Constant utility class.

services/users-service/src/main/java/za/.general_idea: Replace instance-level user list with a static list from a Constant class to remove constructor dependency.
Remove the constructor that previously injected the user list, as state is now accessed statically.

services/cars-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the Maven parent from a custom project structure to spring-boot-starter-parent to inherit Spring Boot dependency management and build defaults.
Updated Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 21 to match the target runtime environment.
Added spring-boot-starter-web dependency to enable RESTful web service capabilities required for the microservice conversion.
Added spring-boot-maven-plugin to the build section to enable repackaging the application into an executable JAR.

services/reservations-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the Maven parent from a custom project structure to spring-boot-starter-parent to inherit Spring Boot dependency management and build defaults.
Updated Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 21 to align with the target runtime environment.
Added spring-boot-starter-web dependency to enable RESTful web service capabilities required for the microservice conversion.
Added spring-boot-maven-plugin to the build section to enable repackaging the application into an executable JAR.

services/users-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the Maven parent from a custom project structure to spring-boot-starter-parent to inherit Spring Boot dependency management and build defaults.
Updated Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 21 to align with the target runtime environment.
Added the Spring Boot Starter Web dependency to enable RESTful web service capabilities.
Added the Spring Boot Maven plugin to the build section to enable repackaging the application into an executable JAR.
